All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages|Constant Field Values|Serialized Form

A

addCombatListenerWhenReady(CombatListener) - Method in class com.example.battleship.controller.MainGameController
Convenience passthrough so callers only need to hold a reference to MainGameController, not to CombatController directly, to listen for turn changes and game-over -- returns silently (does nothing) if combat hasn't started yet.
addIfInBoundsAndShootable(Board, int, int, List<Position>) - Method in class com.example.battleship.model.player.HuntShootingStrategy
Adds (row, column) to candidates if it's within the board and hasn't been shot at yet; otherwise does nothing.
addListener(CombatListener) - Method in class com.example.battleship.controller.CombatController
 
addListener(ShipPlacementListener) - Method in class com.example.battleship.controller.ShipPlacementController
 
addListener(BoardListener) - Method in class com.example.battleship.model.board.Board
 
addMark(Node) - Method in class com.example.battleship.view.BoardView3D
Adds any shot mark (water miss, hit, etc.) generated by ShotMark3D.
addShip(Ship3D) - Method in class com.example.battleship.view.BoardView3D
Adds an already built ship (position and orientation are set at creation time).
addShipToMachineBoard(Ship3D) - Method in class com.example.battleship.view.BattlefieldView3D
Adds a ship to the machine's board (in the machine board's own local 0..360 coordinates).
addShipToPlayerBoard(Ship3D) - Method in class com.example.battleship.view.BattlefieldView3D
Adds a ship to the player's board (in the player board's own local 0..360 coordinates).
addToMachineBoard(Node) - Method in class com.example.battleship.view.BattlefieldView3D
Adds any other node (e.g. a shot mark) to the machine's board.
addToPlayerBoard(Node) - Method in class com.example.battleship.view.BattlefieldView3D
Adds any other node (e.g. a shot mark) to the player's board.
advanceTurnIfNeeded(ShotResult) - Method in class com.example.battleship.model.Game
Passes Game.currentTurn to the other side, unless result grants the same shooter another shot (a hit or a sunk ship, per HU-2).
afterShotResolved() - Method in class com.example.battleship.controller.CombatController
 
AIRCRAFT_CARRIER - Enum constant in enum class com.example.battleship.model.ship.ShipType
1 per fleet, 4 cells.
AircraftCarrier3D - Class in com.example.battleship.view.ships
Aircraft carrier: the largest ship in the fleet, occupies 4 cells.
AircraftCarrier3D(int, int, Orientation) - Constructor for class com.example.battleship.view.ships.AircraftCarrier3D
 
allOrthogonalNeighborsOf(Board, List<Position>) - Method in class com.example.battleship.model.player.HuntShootingStrategy
Every unshot orthogonal neighbor of every cell in the cluster, combined -- the fallback once both line-ends are exhausted.
anchorColumn - Variable in class com.example.battleship.view.ships.Ship3D
 
anchorRow - Variable in class com.example.battleship.view.ships.Ship3D
 
applyMaterialRecursively(Node, PhongMaterial) - Method in class com.example.battleship.view.ships.Ship3D
Recursively applies a material to every Shape3D found under node.
applyShotFeedback(Group, Map<Ship, Ship3D>, Position, ShotResult, Ship) - Method in class com.example.battleship.controller.CombatController
 
areAllShipsSunk() - Method in class com.example.battleship.model.board.Board
 
attachDragControls(Node) - Method in class com.example.battleship.view.OrbitCameraRig3D
Wires up mouse-drag orbiting on the given node (normally the SubScene or a full-size transparent pane on top of it).
attachedScene - Variable in class com.example.battleship.controller.ShipPlacementController
 
attachTo(Node) - Method in class com.example.battleship.controller.CombatController
Wires this controller's mouse handling onto pickSurface (normally the BattlefieldView3D itself), taking over from whichever controller was handling input before.
attachTo(Node) - Method in class com.example.battleship.controller.ShipPlacementController
Wires this controller's mouse and keyboard handling onto pickSurface (normally the BattlefieldView3D itself).
attemptPlacement(int, int) - Method in class com.example.battleship.controller.ShipPlacementController
 
autoSave() - Method in class com.example.battleship.controller.CombatController
HU-5: writes the current game state to disk after every resolved shot, so "Continuar" on the main menu always has the freshest possible state to offer -- there's no separate "save" action to remember to use.
azimuthRotate - Variable in class com.example.battleship.view.OrbitCameraRig3D
Pivot is (0,0,0) by default -- exactly what makes this an orbit, not a look-around.
